title: PMO – Qualitäts- & Risikomanagement
missing_skills: German C1 required (CV: B1 only) — HARD BLOCKER for German IT company
10+ years total experience (CV: ~7 years, incl. student roles)
4+ years project worker/consultant in digitalization (CV: ~2 years)
Quality management: documentation review, Quality Gates, QA
IPMA Level D or equivalent PM certification (CV has PL-300 BI cert only)
recommended_emphasis: Highlight HSBC PMO governance and risk escalation experience
Emphasise Jira-based sprint governance and quality documentation at Hapag-Lloyd
Frame Power BI dashboards as Reporting/Controlling capability
Note: German language gap (B1) should be addressed honestly
core_responsibilities: Planung und Steuerung mittlerer bis komplexer Projekte
Risiko- und Qualitätsmanagement inkl. Analyse und Maßnahmensteuerung
Reporting, Controlling und Dokumentation von Risiken
summary: Weak match (38.9). The candidate has relevant PMO and project coordination experience (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd) and covers the technical tools (JIRA, MS Office). However, multiple hard gaps exist: German C1 is a hard requirement (candidate is B1 only); the role requires 10+ years total experience and 4+ years specifically in risk/quality management which the CV does not demonstrate; IPMA certification is required but absent; MS Project is listed as required. The German language gap alone would likely screen the candidate out for a German Mittelstand IT services company.
